# Regularisation Surveyors

> We are expert Chartered Surveyors based in Poole, serving the South Coast of the UK. We specialise in resolving unauthorised building works and managing Local Authority Building Control (LABC) regularisation applications.

## Core Services
- Missing Certificates: Securing retrospective approval for past works done without consent.
- Stalled Property Sales: Fast-tracking compliance reviews to resolve paperwork issues holding up property transactions.
- Unsigned Extensions: Providing structural audits required to regularise historical extensions.

## Eligibility
- Regularisation is only applicable for unauthorised works completed on or after 11th November 1985.
- Work completed prior to this date cannot be regularised under current legislation.

## Contact Information
- Website: https://regularisation.co.uk
- Location: Poole, Dorset, UK
